narrative:
Perrysburg City has 18,653 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.6%, a clear Republican lean of 8.1 percentage points.
